@uncledullaz / day 42 — js keep complete · react begins

> how to export:
  1. Wait 2–3s for Google Fonts to load, then click download all 6 slides. Slide 1 logos + DP are embedded as data URLs so export works from file:// too.
  2. Replace <!-- REPLACE --> blocks with your actual video/image, then re-export.
  3. Upload all 6 slides in order to Instagram as a carousel.
UD

What I built.

// vanilla js · OOP · full CRUD · persistence

OOP
Note + App class architecture new Note() creates objects · App manages state & DOM
CRUD
Create, read, edit & archive notes addNote() · displayNotes() · editNote() · deleteNote()
STORE
localStorage persistence notes survive refresh via JSON.stringify + JSON.parse
UX
Sidebar hover expand + modal editing mouseover toggle · closest() event delegation
